title: OpenClaw Creator's new secret project...
summary: AI Jason discusses OpenClaw Creator's new secret project, providing a GitHub repository for setting up Crabbox and Codebase harness through the AI Builder Club. The project includes Superdesign, a development tool available at superdesign.dev.
writeup: AI Jason covers OpenClaw Creator's new secret project, walking through a GitHub repository for setting up Crabbox and a Codebase harness via the AI Builder Club. The project also includes Superdesign, a development tool hosted at superdesign.dev. The practical takeaways are the harness setup steps and the resources needed to run the tools.
